meaning: n.(从眼睛至所见物之间的或剧场内各处至舞台的) 视线
examples: When he spoke at last, I think his sightline was on a crack in the pavement.
CURVED PROFILE AND ORANGE SIGHTLINE show the player the proper stroke path.
There was the time, at 16, when she didn't much like her leading man, so she put a piece of chocolate cake in her sightline offstage so she could instead lust after that.
